name: Radio button

options.note: Min 2, max 10 options. More than 10: use Dropdown.

selected_value.note: Do not preselect if choice is critical.

label.note: Sentence case. No punctuation at end.

decision_guide.radio_vs_checkbox: Radio: exclusive single choice. Checkbox: non-exclusive multi-choice.
decision_guide.radio_vs_dropdown: Radio: use when options must always be visible and there are 2–10 options. Dropdown: use when options can be collapsed or there are more than 10.
decision_guide.none_option: If user may select none, add a 'None' or 'Does not apply' option at the bottom of the list.

usage_rules.rule: Radio for exclusive single choice only
usage_rules.detail: If multiple options can be selected simultaneously, use Checkbox instead.
Radio groups must have at least 2 options. For more than 10 options, use Dropdown instead.

usage_rules.rule: Do not preselect for critical choices
usage_rules.detail: Only preselect an option if the choice is not critical. Once selected, user cannot return to no selection.
Radio buttons show all options at all times. If options can be collapsed, use Dropdown.

usage_rules.rule: No commas or semicolons at end of labels
usage_rules.detail: Labels must not end with punctuation.
Sort by frequency of use or logical order.
All option labels must use sentence case.

keyboard: Arrow keys to navigate within group
accessibility.label_association: Group needs accessible label via aria-labelledby or fieldset/legend

confidence_blockers: If ticket uses radio for multi-select, flag and suggest Checkbox.
If ticket has more than 10 radio options, flag and suggest Dropdown.
If ticket requires no-selection state in a radio group, remind to add None/Does not apply option.

embedding_text: Radio button component. Exclusive single choice selection. Min 2 max 10 options always visible. Use Dropdown for more than 10 or collapsible. Use Checkbox for multi-select. No preselection for critical choices. Add None option if no-selection is valid. Sentence case labels no punctuation.
